creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: This might be a false alarm.  From inspection, I can't find any code paths that would result in the "struct stat" buffer being uninitialized.  Plus, nfscl_cberrmap+0xb86 does not lie within any known function, according to kgdb.  Unless I can produce a build where KMSAN can correctly determine the location of the offending function, this will be impossible to fix.
